inputs.label: Cathode Standard Reduction Potential (E°_cathode)
inputs.businessContext: Standard reduction potential of the cathode half-reaction, e.g., Cu²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Cu is 0.34 V.

inputs.label: Anode Standard Reduction Potential (E°_anode)
inputs.businessContext: Standard reduction potential of the anode half-reaction, e.g., Zn²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Zn is -0.76 V.

inputs.label: Temperature (T)
inputs.businessContext: Temperature in Kelvin. Standard conditions are 298.15 K (25°C).

inputs.label: Number of Electrons Transferred (n)
inputs.businessContext: Number of moles of electrons transferred according to the balanced redox reaction.

inputs.label: Reaction Quotient (Q)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of product activities to reactant activities at given concentrations/pressures. For aA + bB → cC + dD, Q = [C]^c[D]^d / [A]^a[B]^b.
